stimulus: Elena, the main character of a fictional novel set in ancient Rome, is a young scribe. She completely loses her memory whenever she sleeps. So, before sleeping, Elena records the important events of each day on a wax tablet, carefully choosing which moments to ______blank.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice C is correct because "keep" means to retain or hold onto, matching Elena’s effort to remember moments after losing her memory. Choice A is incorrect because suspecting doesn’t fit recording memories. Choice B is incorrect because imagining contradicts recording real events. Choice D is incorrect because suggesting doesn’t describe retention.
